title: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
content: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.

originalTitle: 'I'd rather live in hiding in the US than return to Somalia'
title: 'I'd rather live in hiding in the US than return to Somalia'
content: Fear and uncertainty linger for Somali migrants in Minnesota despite a legal reprieve.

originalTitle: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
title: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
content: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

originalTitle: Niger suspends nine French media bodies: Watchdog slams ‘abusive’ decision
title: Niger suspends nine French media bodies: Watchdog slams ‘abusive’ decision
content: Niger's military government has banned dozens of local and foreign reporters since seizing power in 2023.

originalTitle: Palestinians run West Bank freedom marathon along separation wall
title: Palestinians run West Bank freedom marathon along separation wall
content: Palestinians ran alongside the separation wall today, a structure that cuts them off from their land and their families.

title: One dead in US after being struck by taking off Frontier Airlines plane
content: Authorities say individual jumped fence at Denver International Airport in Colorado before being struck.

title: Putin denounces Nato at scaled back Victory Day parade
content: The Russian leader used his annual speech to justify his so-called special military operation in Ukraine.

content: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

originalTitle: I will serve - not rule over Hungary, says new PM
title: I will serve - not rule over Hungary, says new PM
content: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.

originalTitle: Boos, no intensity and no identity - what is Slot's Liverpool?

content: More boos at Anfield highlight why Liverpool must change their style during a seismic summer for Arne Slot.

originalTitle: Spirited Chelsea stop rot with FA Cup final blueprint
title: Spirited Chelsea stop rot with FA Cup final blueprint
content: Chelsea were facing the prospect of becoming the first team in English football history to lose seven consecutive league matches heading into an FA Cup final when they fell 1-0 behind at Anfield, but they found a way out.

originalTitle: Crunch Clasico as Barca look to pounce on Real unrest
title: Crunch Clasico as Barca look to pounce on Real unrest
content: Barcelona host Real Madrid in the second Clasico of the season, bidding to clinch a second consecutive La Liga title. They face a team in crisis, in a rivalry where there is no mercy.
